readiness_report.human_readable_report:
The final status is BLOCKED.
The key blockers are:
* Consent: Missing required consent: ORGAN_TRANSPLANT
* Medication: Insufficient medication, treatment with beta-blockers in precious cardiac disease requires review by attending physician
* Blood: Insufficient blood units: O+
Logistics warnings include regional transport required before procedure can start and scheduled time is earlier than readiness check time.
Please review and approve this decision before any action is taken.
